sections.paragraph: m. pl. חַגְוֵי־הַסֶּלַע places of refuge in the rocks [perhaps dwellings carved in the rocks], Son 2:14 Oba 1:3 Jer 49:16. (Arabic مَحُجّءُ a refuge, an asylum. Syr. ܚܶܓܐܳ, ܚܓܳܙܳ a lofty rock, a cliff. [It is doubtful whether these Syriac words are really used in these senses.])
